testcase.name: createWithoutIdempotencyKey
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-14T23:49:48.872+04:00 INFO 12999 --- [wrongbook-service] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.longfeng.wrongbook.WrongbookAdversarialIT]: WrongbookAdversarialIT does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-14T23:49:48.883+04:00 INFO 12999 --- [wrongbook-service] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.longfeng.wrongbook.Application for test class com.longfeng.wrongbook.WrongbookAdversarialIT 2026-05-14T23:49:48.920+04:00 ERROR 12999 --- [wrongbook-service] [-auto-1-exec-10] o.a.c.c.C.[.[.[/].[dispatcherServlet] : Servlet.service() for servlet [dispatcherServlet] in context with path [] threw exception [Request processing failed: com.longfeng.common.exception.BusinessException: msgkey:wb.error.idempotency_key_required] with root cause

testcase.name: createWithSqlInjectionSubject
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-14T23:49:49.111+04:00 WARN 12999 --- [wrongbook-service] [o-auto-1-exec-5] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : SQL Error: 0, SQLState: 22001 2026-05-14T23:49:49.112+04:00 ERROR 12999 --- [wrongbook-service] [o-auto-1-exec-5] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : ERROR: value too long for type character varying(16) 2026-05-14T23:49:49.122+04:00 ERROR 12999 --- [wrongbook-service] [o-auto-1-exec-5] o.a.c.c.C.[.[.[/].[dispatcherServlet] : Servlet.service() for servlet [dispatcherServlet] in context with path [] threw exception [Request processing failed: org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: could not execute statement [ERROR: value too long for type character varying(16)] [insert into public.wrong_item (created_at,deleted_at,difficulty,grade_code,mastered_at,mastery,ocr_text,origin_image_key,processed_image_key,source_type,status,stem_text,student_id,subject,updated_at,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into public.wrong_item (created_at,deleted_at,difficulty,grade_code,mastered_at,mastery,ocr_text,origin_image_key,processed_image_key,source_type,status,stem_text,student_id,subject,updated_at,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]] with root cause
org.postgresql.util.PSQLException: ERROR: value too long for type character varying(16) at org.postgresql.core.v3.QueryExecutorImpl.receiveErrorResponse(QueryExecutorImpl.java:2713)
